text: 14 research agents dispatched: 10 verifying existing figures, 4 scoring new figures. Dossiers land in docs/figures/<slug>.md; METHOD.md is the rubric.

Deep-research pass complete: 42 figures (28 verified, 14 new) with per-question dossiers in docs/figures/, ~90 scores corrected, QUESTION-PROPOSALS.md awaits Ethan review. Commit abcbc88. Built OK; NOT deployed (deploy is Ethan-gated).
Figures UX round 2 shipped: de-overlap, show-me toggle, nearest/farthest, Factions page + econ/social chart. Verified on live dev server (port 3000). Unpushed local commits; deploy still Ethan-gated.
Deployed to political-test-2026.web.app (Ethan-directed): 42-figure verified map, Factions page, side-by-side charts, card grid, tooltips, favicon. Verified live post-deploy.
